name: Blue Yonder Group, Inc.
h1: Blue Yonder's GCC footprint in India
lede: Blue Yonder runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Hyderabad, covering CoE, built over 37 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Blue Yonder office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Blue Yonder Group, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Blue Yonder runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Hyderabad), covering CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Blue Yonder's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Hyderabad, spanning CoE. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Supply Chain and Logistics Software, Business Software Solutions

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 29 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Blue Yonder operate in India?
faq.a: Blue Yonder operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Blue Yonder have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Blue Yonder's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Blue Yonder run in India?
faq.a: Blue Yonder runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Blue Yonder's India GCCs?
faq.a: Blue Yonder's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Blue Yonder's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 29 leaders at Blue Yonder's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
